content.problemStatement:
You are given two positive integers aaa and bbb. You also have a number xxx, which is initially set to 000. At first, you can add aaa to xxx any number of times. After that, you can divide xxx by bbb any number of times as long as xxx is divisible by bbb.

Print **YES** if you can make xxx equal to 111, otherwise print **NO**.


Input Format

First line of input will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains a single line, two positive integers a,ba, ba,b.


Output Format
For each test case, output on one line YES if it is possible to make xxx , or NO if it is not possible to do so.


Output is case insensitive, which means that "yes", "Yes", "YEs", "no", "nO" - all such strings will be acceptable.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 222: We initially have xxx set to 000. Add a=9a = 9a=9 to xxx for 444 times to make xxx equal to 363636. And then divide xxx by b=6b = 6b=6 for 222 times to make xxx equal to 111.
Test case 444: We initially have xxx set to 000. Add a=8a = 8a=8 to xxx for 181818 times to make xxx equal to 144144144. And then divide xxx by b=12b = 12b=12 for 222 times to make xxx equal to 111.
